notes: Non-REST adaptor. formsg makes no outbound API calls; decryptSubmission, verifyWebhook and processWebhook run the @opengovsg/formsg-sdk locally to verify the X-FormSG-Signature webhook header and decrypt the submission encryptedContent with the form secret key. Synthesized from the adaptor operation surface: endpoints model the operations as request/response pairs so the EncryptedSubmission and DecryptedSubmission shapes seed as collections. Server URL is a mock placeholder.
